title: Creative Developers
description:
*MSAB is a global leader in digital forensic technology for mobile device examination and analysis. The MSAB vision is to empower every investigation with digital forensic solutions – for a safer world. A core value is to run an ethics-driven company with innovation and results. The sole focus of MSAB is on delivering high quality digital forensic solutions to collect, review, analyze and manage data. MSAB is a trusted partner to Law Enforcement, Defence Forces, Government Agencies and Forensic Laboratories in democratic countries throughout the world enabling them to investigate crime, gather intelligence, investigate fraud and fight corruption.*
 We love creating great code that matters - and the people who write it. We are always on the look-out for coders skilled in C++ or C# with innovative mindset.
   

  

 If you want to use your coding expertise and problem-solving mindset to make the world more transparent, safer, and more democratic? At MSAB, you can turn that ambition into reality.
   

  

 We’re a global leader in digital forensics, building advanced tools used worldwide to solve crimes, fight corruption, investigate fraud, and support justice. Here, your code has real-world impact.
   

  

**Possibilities**
 As a developer at MSAB, you’ll dive deep into complex and highly technical challenges - exactly the kind that motivate curious, inventive engineers.
   

  

**Your Work Might Involve**
* Extracting and decrypting data from mobile devices
* Writing decoders, parsers, and low-level implementations
* Reverse-engineering apps and making complex data structures readable
* Implementing efficient, high-performance code in C++
* Working close to hardware, embedded systems, Android, or iOS internals


 If that excites you - you’re exactly who we want to meet.
   

  

**Our Culture**
 Our culture is friendly, supportive, and built on shared learning and technical curiosity. You’ll thrive here if you enjoy autonomy, like exploring new ideas, and want to grow by stepping outside your comfort zone.
   

  

 There’s much more to tell you about our tech stack, vision, innovation and ways of working, and the opportunities ahead. But let’s save that for future conversations.
   

  

 Ready to build software that makes a real difference?
   

  

 Send your application today.
   

  

 For more information about MSAB, please visit: http://www.msab.com
   

  

 What we can offer
   

  

 Create a safer world with us!
   

  

 As one of the world’s leading digital forensics companies, MSAB leads the way in pioneering advancements that contribute to making our world safer.
   

  

 Your work at MSAB will bridge the gap between technology and justice. You will be inspired to go beyond your comfort zone, and you will deal with challenging and meaningful projects. When you join us, you become part of a global team that aspires to create a safer digital future, one breakthrough at a time.
   

  

 We can offer you an exciting work environment, where we value being innovative, acting ethically and delivering results in everything we do while our customers' needs are at the center. We are proud to be a fast-growing international company with more than 20+ nationalities and we work with things that really make a difference.
   

  

 Every day at MSAB is an opportunity to redefine the future of digital forensics.
   

  

 Are you up for the challenge?
   

  

 Department Development Locations Stockholm, Sweden Remote status Hybrid

title: Software Engineer (AI & Platform)
description:
**Noru** 
 is building the
 **trust and resilience layer** 
 for IT-driven companies, turning the complex, costly, and static world of Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) into a living, continuous, and automated system. Our
 **Vision** 
 is to empower every company to operate securely, resiliently, and with trust — by design.
 


  


 We have already secured our
 **first customers — even pre-launch** 
 , with strong demand and real-world validation of our approach. The market is shifting fast, and Noru is at the center of that transformation.
 


  


 We are now hiring a
 **Software Engineer** 
 — a rare opportunity to join the core team and take complete technical ownership of the platform and the AI intelligence layer. This role is for a
 **builder** 
 , not a theorist: someone who turns ambiguity into production systems and learns by doing.
 


  

 Tasks
   


 As a Software Engineer, you will have end-to-end responsibility for the most critical technical components of the Noru platform. Your main responsibilities and typical tasks will include:
 


  

  
* **Architect & Productionize Core AI:** 
 Design, build, and deploy our primary AI systems and LLM workflows that ingest vast amounts of corporate data (logs, configurations, policies) to perform continuous security and trust validation.
  
* **Foundational Platform Decisions:** 
 Establish the core technical architecture (data models, infrastructure, services) that ensures maximum scalability, security, and low-latency performance for real-time GRC monitoring.
  
* **Full-Stack Engineering:** 
 Own the implementation across the entire stack—from developing robust data ingestion pipelines in the backend to designing intuitive user interfaces in the front-end that present continuous trust insights.
  
* **System Integration:** 
 Develop secure, reliable integration frameworks to connect Noru with diverse enterprise systems (SSO, cloud environments, version control, ticketing systems) to establish a truly "living" GRC platform.
  
* **Pioneering Automation:** 
 Translate complex security and compliance standards (e.g., ISO, SOC 2) into elegant, automated, and continuously running validation logic, fulfilling our mission to
 **prove compliance automatically.**
  
* **Shape the Product With Us:** 
 Work closely with the founders and early customers to rapidly iterate based on feedback and emerging needs.
  


  

 Requirements
   


 We prioritize talent, drive, and demonstrated ability over years of experience. We seek an engineer with exceptional intelligence, high agency, and the "hungry" ambition to build difficult things that matter.
 


  


**You likely demonstrate this through a combination of the following:** 



  

  
* **Proven Track Record:** 
 You have a history of successfully building, shipping, and scaling complex software systems, evidenced by strong professional experience, impactful personal projects, or an elite academic background.
  
* **AI/LLM Proficiency:** 
 Direct, hands-on experience building production-grade, data-driven applications utilizing large language models (LLMs), natural language processing (NLP), or complex data processing pipelines.
  
* **First-Principles Thinking:** 
 You are a critical and rapid learner who doesn't wait for specifications. You can identify ambiguous business problems, design robust technical solutions from the ground up, and execute independently.
  
* **Technical Fluency:** 
 Comfort and proficiency with modern, full-stack development, and experience with modern cloud environments (GCP, AWS, or Azure).
  
* **Domain Passion:** 
 A deep interest in cybersecurity, IT resilience, compliance (GRC), or a rapid willingness to master this complex and crucial domain.
  


  

 Benefits
   


 Working as a Software Engineer at Noru is about maximizing your impact and accelerating your career trajectory:
 


  

  
* **Founding Equity:** 
 Meaningful option package aligned with Noru’s long-term success.
  
* **Clear Path to Leadership:** 
 This role is the clear and immediate path to becoming our Head of Engineering, VP of Engineering or even CTO as we scale, with massive organizational responsibility.
  
* **Build the Future Stack:** 
 The opportunity to make all foundational technical decisions with a clean slate, free from legacy debt.
  
* **Meaningful Mission:** 
 Build a product that genuinely helps companies reduce risk, increase resilience, and build stronger, verifiable trust with their customers and partners.
  
* **Elite Team & Mentorship:** 
 Direct collaboration with founders who prioritize technical excellence and high-performance culture.
  


  


 Please submit your CV along with a brief description of the most complex technical system you’ve built — how you approached it, how you executed, and what you learned.
 


  


 As part of our process, we conduct on-site work samples and practical technical tests.
 


  


 These are collaborative, realistic sessions designed to understand how you think, build, and solve problems in practice — not trick questions or whiteboard puzzles.
 


  


 If you’re a builder ready to define the intelligence layer for global business resilience, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Junior Product Developer Soft Accessories - H&M Womenswear
description:
**Job Description**

*Are you passionate about fashion, trends and the idea of creating soft accessories that inspire and elevate the everyday wardrobe?*




 We are now looking for a curious and motivated Junior Product Developer to join our Women Accessories team at H&M, with a specific focus on Soft Accessories such as hats, scarves, gloves and related categories. If you thrive in a fast paced and creative environment and want to grow your skills in product development, this is an opportunity to contribute to a global assortment that our customers love.
   

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO**
  

 As a Junior Product Developer within
 
 Soft Accessories, you will play an important role in the dynamic and multifaceted process of developing products for collections sold across all our markets worldwide.
   

  





 Together with a close and collaborative accessories team, you will support the development of a relevant and attractive soft accessories assortment, based on upcoming trends, customer needs and commercial insights. Your main responsibility will be to support the Product Developer in shaping the assortment and creating products that are aligned with our strategy, targets and customer expectations.
   

  





 You will work closely with a Product Manager, Designers, Planners and other key functions throughout the development process. Acting as an important link between teams, you will help drive the process forward and ensure smooth coordination from initial idea to final product.
   

  





 In this role, you will be involved in the daily operational work, managing several parallel tasks. This includes sample handling, follow ups and supporting the development of soft accessories that are beautifully made, commercially strong and relevant for the womenswear customer.
   

  





  

  





**WHO YOU ARE**
  

 We are looking for people with
   

  




* At least one year of hands on experience in product development or buying within fashion
* Specific experience from working with soft accessories or knitwear
* Relevant education in fashion, buying or product development
* A commercial mindset with a strong drive to contribute to business growth
* A good understanding of the womenswear customer and a strong interest in accessories and trends
* A structured and organised way of working, with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously
* A collaborative and communicative approach, thriving in a cross functional environment with a humble and hands on attitude
* A curious mindset and eagerness to continuously learn and develop
* Strong commercial thinking, with an eye for opportunities and improvements
* A passion for finding smarter ways of working and contributing to better everyday processes



  

  





**WHO WE ARE** 
**​**
  

 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





  

  





**JOIN US**
  

 Additional information:
   

  

 This is a
 **full time temporary position based at our HQ in Stockholm.**
  

 If you feel your experience, skills and ambitions are right for this role, please send your application including CV in English as soon as possible. Interviews will be held continuously. (For internal candidates, please initiate a dialogue with you manager before applying.) If you are currently in a permanent employment with H&M you will keep your permanent employment even if you take on a temporary position for a limited time.
   

  





 Benefits:
   

  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP.
   

  





 Inclusion & Diversity:
   

  

 H&M is a part of H&M Group. At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse and equitable workplaces throughout our organisation. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process.
   

  





 We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.
   

  





  

  





**Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.**

title: Staff Software Engineer (Rendering)
description:
**Company Overview**
 Metrea delivers effects-as-a-service to national security partners across five domains and more than a dozen mission areas—including airborne ISR, electronic warfare, secure communications, aerial refueling, special mission aviation, aerial firefighting, and advanced simulation.
   

  

 Wherever we operate, we build vertically integrated full stacks of capability—designing, building, and operating turnkey solutions that let customers scale capacity while benefiting from continuous cycles of innovation. With operators and engineers under one roof, we close the gap between lab and field—what we call connecting design with effect.
   

  

 Metrea’s solutions are built for elegance: effective, efficient, and evolving. This approach enables our partners to do more with less and achieve outsized, asymmetric advantage against rapidly evolving threats.
   

  

 Headquartered in Washington, DC, Metrea has facilities across the United States, the United Kingdom, Europe, and beyond.
   

  

 Group Overview
   

  

 The Digital and Synthetic Capability Unit (D&S) is committed to providing mission-driven information solutions that seamlessly bridge the digital and physical realms. Leveraging cutting-edge technologies and advanced platforms, we empower operational readiness and elevate situational awareness across diverse domains—including air, maritime, and space.
   

  

 Position Summary
   

  

 In this role you will join our World team and work on optimization of real-time rendering systems, with an emphasis on modern rendering techniques and GPU pipeline mastery. While expertise with Unreal Engine is not mandatory, it is considered a significant advantage. As a candidate you will bring a deep understanding of rendering architectures, shader programming, and the latest technologies.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

* Develop and optimize real-time rendering pipelines for high-performance visuals
* Collaborate closely with artists, designers, and other engineers to bring creative visions to life while maintaining technical feasibility
* Profile, debug, and optimize GPU and CPU performance to meet performance benchmarks
* Write, maintain, and document clean, reusable, and efficient code
* Integrate rendering features seamlessly into existing pipelines and identify areas for innovation
* Stay updated on the latest advancements in real-time rendering and integrate applicable technologies into the workflow


 What You Bring
   

  

* Strong understanding of the GPU pipeline and modern rendering architectures
* Expertise in HLSL/GLSL or equivalent shader programming languages
* Proficiency with DirectX, Vulkan, OpenGL, or other low-level graphics APIs
* Experience implementing modern rendering techniques such as deferred shading, compute shader driven drawing, ray tracing effects and similar
* Ability to profile and optimize rendering performance for real-time applications
* 5+ years of C++ programming experience
* Bonus: In-depth knowledge of Unreal Engine 4/5 source code, rendering modules, and provided shaders


**In addition to the above, any of the following would be beneficial:**
* Passion for pushing the boundaries of what is possible in real-time rendering
* Strong communication skills and a collaborative mindset to work effectively within a multidisciplinary team
* Self-motivated with a proactive approach to problem-solving
* Flexibility to adapt to new challenges and technologies as they arise
* Experience in gaming, simulation, or VR/AR projects is a plus


**Benefits**
* Friskvård of 5K annually
* Parental leave
* 5% occupational pension (swe. tjänstepension)
* 30 days of leave
* Bonus Scheme
* Personal development opportunities


 Right to Work
   

  

 The employee will have the legal right to work in Sweden and will be able to produce right to work documentation.
   

  

 Equal Opportunities Statement
   

  

 Metrea Management Limited (MAM) is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or other characteristics protected by law.
   

  

 Position Type and Expected Hours of Work
   

  

 This is a full-time non-exempt position with typical working hours of Monday through Friday, 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. Hours and work shifts may change in accordance with department and business needs. Exempt Employees must have the ability to be on-call and available, as business needs require. Non-Exempt employees may be required to work over 40 hours per week with approval from the department manager.
   

  

 Work Location
   

  

 3 days per week from the office in Stockholm, London or Warsaw
   

  

 Work Environment
   

  

 This job operates in an office setting
   

  

 Travel
   

  

 No travel required
   

  

 Our Firmware
   

  

 At Metrea, our single core value, Rooted in Humility, and our four cornerstone attributes—Entrepreneurial, Systematic, Discerning, and Over-Deliver. These form what we call our Teammate Firmware. Just like technical firmware connects software and hardware, our Firmware is the constant interface between our mission and our people. It defines how we show up, how we work together, and how we solve complex problems.
   

  

 Our team Firmware creates a web-like, hyper-collaborative, dynamically hierarchical way of working that helps us adapt quickly, communicate openly, and distribute decision-making to where expertise actually lives. It enables groups to self-organize around hard problems, shift fluidly as priorities evolve, and operate with the trust, curiosity, and discipline required in a complex mission space. This foundation allows us to deliver elegant, effective solutions and uphold our purpose: protecting our precious inheritance.

title: Backend Developer
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.
   

  

 We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a
 **Backend Developer** 
 , as part of our Account Sharing Prevention team, in our
 **Stockholm** 
 office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Backend developer at Viaplay Group, you’ll play a key role in building and shaping our backend production services. From design and development to testing and deployment, you’ll be involved in the full product lifecycle, helping us deliver high-quality, user-friendly experiences across our platforms.
   

  

 You will join an autonomous, metrics-driven, cross-functional and diverse team of skilled developers focused on delivering engineering solutions aligned with our long-term technical and product vision. We build our entire product in-house, using both native and cross-platform languages. We strongly believe in staying on the cutting edge of technology, keeping up to date, and constantly challenging the status quo.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
 We are looking for a Mid-level Backend Engineer with solid experience building and maintaining production backend services. You should be comfortable working in a modern cloud-based environment and taking ownership of services from development to deployment and monitoring. You thrive in a high energy, team-driven environment where you love getting stuff done and having fun while you are doing it.
   

  

**For this role, we are looking for candidates who have:**
* 3+ years of professional experience in backend development
* Strong experience with Node.js and TypeScript
* Experience designing, building, and maintaining REST APIs or service-to-service APIs
* Experience working with AWS services, such as Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, CloudFront, ECS, or similar
* Experience with Docker and containerized applications
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, preferably using GitHub Actions or similar tools
* Strong communication skills and ability to work closely with product managers, client teams, and data engineers


**It’s a bonus if you have:** 
  

  

* Experience with Rust or willingness to learn
* Eager to explore AI and committed to continuously evolving the craft alongside new tools and industry shifts
* Experience with DynamoDB data modelling and performance considerations
* Experience working with distributed systems or microservice-based architectures
* Familiarity with infrastructure-as-code tools or AWS deployment patterns


 What we offer you
   

  

* We’ve got you covered! 30 days of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
* Your wellbeing matters. We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
* Flexibility that works. We follow a hybrid model with at least three days a week in the office, giving you the best mix of collaboration and focus time.
* A safe space to grow and up-skill. Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
* An innovative environment with Hack Days once a year. This week-long initiative allows you to think outside the box and deliver creative, technical solutions that (more often than not) go on to be implemented, either in our product or our ways of working.
* Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do. So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including serier & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.


**Hit play today**
 If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position.
   

  

 Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision. By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.
   

  

 1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to
 **$100M+ in ARR** 
 , with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.
   

  

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.
   

  

 Joining Legora means three things.
   

  

* We lean in: ownership over titles, outcomes over intentions.
* We fight for excellence: high standards, direct, ego-free feedback.
* We grow together: as a team and with our customers.


 Mission before ego. Everyone contributes. No one coasts.
   

  

 If you’re driven by impact, pace, and raising the bar. This is the place.
   

  

**The role**
 As a Senior Software Engineer at Legora you will build, review and ship amazing products helping legal professionals all over the world in their day-to-day job. You’ll get the chance to work across the entire tech stack with clear ownership and autonomy.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Architect and implement features end-to-end for our web platform
* Take ownership of our codebase, balancing high-quality code, security and speed of development
* Work with technologies such as React, Node.js, AWS, Azure and Kubernetes
* Review code and mentor junior colleagues to support them in their development, making the team even better!
* Drive continuous improvement and challenge us, the industry and yourself


**Who You Are**
* A passionate engineer with a several years of experience building great products using cutting-edge technologies
* You feel comfortable working across the entire tech stack, with focus on backend development
* You’re autonomous and take pride in the code you write
* You’re a problem solver who’s not afraid to come up with creative solutions and think holistically about software architecture
* Experience in infrastructure and integrations are a big plus


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: AI-Utvecklare
description:
Vill du utveckla AI- och ML-tjänster som faktiskt går i produktion och gör verklig skillnad för människor och djur? Hos oss får du kombinera modern fullstackutveckling med avancerad AI, från NLP och chatbotar till bildigenkänning, i en miljö där du är med och formar både arkitektur och lösning.
   

  

 Om rollen
   

  

 Du blir en central del i ett team som bygger intelligenta tjänster ovanpå en modern Azure-plattform. Här jobbar du både med klassisk systemutveckling och hands-on AI-utveckling. Du rör dig obehindrat mellan backend i .NET, frontend i React och AI-komponenter i Python, och du är med hela vägen från idé och prototyp till produktion och vidare optimering.
   

  

 IT och affären jobbar nära tillsammans, vilket betyder att du snabbt ser effekten av det du bygger. Du samarbetar tätt med andra utvecklingsteam för att säkerställa att våra lösningar hänger ihop från frontend till backend – och att AI-funktionaliteten faktiskt används och skapar värde.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Bygga moderna frontend-lösningar med React, TypeScript och microfrontend-arkitektur
* Jobba testdrivet och bidra till hög kvalitet i koden
* Designa och implementera integrationer med både synkrona och asynkrona mönster
* Vara delaktig i mjukvaruarkitektur och tekniska vägval
* Bygga och optimera CI/CD-pipelines med Azure och Azure DevOps
* Automatisera miljöer och infrastruktur med Bicep
* Utveckla och implementera avancerade AI-lösningar med fokus på NLP, intelligenta system och bildigenkänning
* Bygga, integrera och optimera chatbotar och språkmodeller (inklusive generativ AI)


 För att lyckas i tjänsten tror vi att du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av generativ AI och av att ha deployat applikationer i produktion
* God kunskap av fullstack-utveckling med .NET och React
* Vana av testdriven eller testfokuserad utveckling
* Erfarenhet av integration mot synkrona och asynkrona gränssnitt/mönster
* Förståelse för mjukvaruarkitektur och hur man bygger skalbara lösningar
* Erfarenhet av att bygga CI/CD-pipelines med Azure som målplattform
* Kunskaper i Bicep
* Flytande i både svenska och engelska


 Som person är du drivande och resultatfokuserad, med en stark nyfikenhet på ny teknik. Du kan växla mellan att arbeta självständigt och i team, och du har ett gott självledarskap. Du håller ordning och reda, dokumenterar på en lagom nivå och bidrar till en kultur där man delar kunskap, utmanar gamla sanningar och tillsammans bygger smartare lösningar.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: Poja Daroui, poja.daroui@agria.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: Mirek Swartz, mirek.swartz@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: Ellinor Jatéus, ellinor.jateus@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Agria är ett helägt dotterbolag till Länsförsäkringar och finns idag i Sverige, Norge, Finland, Danmark, Storbritannien, Tyskland, Frankrike och Irland. Vårt svenska kontor ligger på Gärdet i Stockholm, men vårt hjärta och verksamhet sträcker sig långt utanför Sveriges gränser. Med en tydlig tillväxt agenda fortsätter vi att expandera internationellt, driva innovation och utveckla digitala lösningar som gör verklig skillnad för djurägare. Ett exempel är vårt dotterbolag Agria Vet Guide, som erbjuder digital rådgivning och gör det enklare att hjälpa fler djur snabbare.
   

  

 Vi är marknadsledande i Norden inom djur- och husdjursförsäkringar, med en tydlig vision: att bli Europas mest omtyckta och pålitliga partner för djurägare. Vårt ledarskap handlar inte bara om marknadsandelar; det handlar om att skapa trygghet för både djur och människor, och att göra livet med djur enklare och roligare.

title: Experienced Integration Developer (D365 F&O)
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible.
   

  

 At Packaged Based Solutions (PBS) Nordics, a Capgemini unit, we specialize in ERP transformation for public and private sectors, using platforms like SAP, Microsoft Dynamics, and IFS to help organizations achieve operational excellence and strategic growth. With a strong Nordic presence and a diverse global client base, we guide clients through seamless ERP transformations that deliver lasting value.
   

  

 Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, inclusive world!
   

  

**Your role**
 As an Experienced D365 Finance & Operations (F&O) Integration Developer, you’ll take on a hands-on technical role focused on leading, designing and implementing integration solutions within the Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&O ecosystem. You’ll contribute to shaping our integration strategy, ensuring alignment with enterprise architecture standards, and driving innovation through the adoption of modern Microsoft technologies.
   

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*
* Developing and managing integrations between Dynamics 365 F&O and third-party systems using Azure services, APIs, and other integration tools to ensure seamless data flow and system interoperability.
* Collaborating with stakeholders to gather business requirements and translating them into scalable technical designs, including customizations, integrations, and data migrations.
* Leading the development team in designing and implementing Dynamics 365 F&O solutions, ensuring adherence to best practices and high-quality standards.


**Your profile**
* At least 7 years of technical experience working with Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&O or as a X++ developer with proven hands-on experience developing in X++
* Experience in solution design with technical leadership experience and stakeholder collaboration
* Working experience from implementation and support projects
* A solid understanding of business processes and practices, with the ability to evaluate system gaps and recommend improvements
* An ability to turn functional requirements into technical designs previously involved in full life-cycle projects


*Note: You need to be based in Sweden and have a professional proficiency in Swedish and English to be considered for the role.*
**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* Freedom to shape your work, manage your time with hybrid flexibility, and have the space to be creative, innovate, and make a real difference.
* A variety of social and wellness activities, from sports and health programs to cultural events and art initiatives, designed to bring employees together and enrich work life.
* An inspiring environment where you can accelerate your growth through continuous learning, professional certifications, and world-class programs from Udemy, Harvard Manager Mentor, and our trusted partner learnings. Collaborate with a nordic and global network of experts, gain cutting-edge insights, and stay ahead in the latest technologies and business practices.
* An extensive benefits package, including parental benefits, occupational and flex pension, private insurance, preventive healthcare, and more.


**Application**
*In this recruitment process, we review applications and hire on an ongoing basis.* 
*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
**About Capgemini**
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of over 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2025 global revenues of €22.5 billion. Make it real | www.capgemini.com

title: Software Engineer - Data, Lakehouse and AI Data Platform Engineer - Associate - Stockholm
description:
**Job Description**
**The Opportunity**
 Join a team building the data foundations that support the firm’s AI and analytics capabilities. This role sits within the engineering effort to develop a modern Lakehouse and AI data platform that enables reliable, well-governed and high-performing data use across the firm.
   

  

 At Goldman Sachs, engineering teams are positioned at the centre of the business, building scalable systems, solving complex technical problems and turning data into action. In data engineering roles, the emphasis is on designing, building and maintaining large-scale data platforms, delivering production pipelines, improving reliability and quality, and partnering closely with users of the platform.
   

  

 This is a delivery-focused role for engineers who want to build robust data assets in production, work with modern data technologies, and grow over time within the firm. You will contribute to the data models, pipelines and platform capabilities that underpin analytics, operational decision-making and emerging AI use cases.
   

  

**Role Summary**
 As a
 **Data Engineer, Lakehouse and AI Data Platform** 
 , you will design, build, test and support data pipelines and curated datasets on the firm’s modern data platform. You will work across ingestion, transformation, modelling, optimisation and data quality, helping to deliver data products that are reliable, scalable and fit for purpose.
   

  

 The role is suited to engineers who are comfortable writing code, working with SQL and distributed data processing, and solving practical delivery problems in a team environment. More experienced candidates may also contribute to technical design, platform standards and the shaping of delivery approaches across a wider set of use cases.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Pipeline Engineering**
* Build, enhance and support batch and streaming data pipelines on the Lakehouse and AI data platform.
* Refactor or modernise existing data flows where needed to improve reliability, performance and maintainability.
* Ensure data pipelines are production-ready, well tested and operationally supportable.


**Data Modelling and Curation**
* Develop raw, refined and curated datasets that support analytics, reporting and AI use cases.
* Apply sound data modelling principles to represent business entities, relationships and historical change accurately.
* Work with consumers to shape data products that are usable, well documented and aligned to business needs.


**Data Quality and Reconciliation**
* Implement controls to validate completeness, accuracy and consistency of data across pipelines and datasets.
* Use reconciliation approaches to build confidence in production outputs and investigate breaks where they arise.
* Contribute to clear standards for testing, monitoring and issue resolution.


**Delivery and Partnership**
* Work closely with engineers, platform teams and data consumers to deliver agreed outcomes to time and quality expectations.
* Communicate clearly on progress, risks, dependencies and design choices.


**Required**
**Skills and Experience**
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in a relevant discipline, or equivalent practical experience, with evidence of strong quantitative skills or data engineering expertise.
* Strong hands-on programming experience in Python or Java.
* Good working knowledge of SQL, including troubleshooting, optimisation and data analysis.
* Ability to learn new tools, internal platforms and delivery workflows quickly.
* Familiarity with software engineering fundamentals, including version control, testing, release discipline and CI/CD practices.


**Data Engineering Capability**
* Understanding of temporal data modelling, including the handling of historical state and change over time.
* Knowledge of schema design, schema evolution and data compatibility considerations.
* Understanding of partitioning, clustering and other techniques used to improve data performance at scale.
* Ability to make sensible design choices across normalised and denormalised models, and between natural and surrogate keys.
* Practical approach to data quality, reconciliation and root-cause analysis.
* Experience building or supporting production data pipelines in a collaborative engineering environment.
* Experience working with distributed data processing frameworks such as Apache Spark.
* Working knowledge of common data formats such as JSON, Avro and Parquet.


**Technology Environment**
 The role will involve working with a modern and evolving data stack. Candidates are not expected to have deep expertise in every tool from day one but should bring relevant experience and the ability to work across comparable technologies.
   

  

**Examples Of Technologies In Scope Include**
* Data processing and logic: ANSI SQL, Apache Spark, Kafka
* Data formats: JSON, Avro, Parquet
* Platforms and storage: Snowflake, Apache Iceberg, Databricks, Hadoop ecosystem technologies, Sybase IQ
* Engineering and deployment: CI/CD tooling, containerised or Kubernetes-based deployment approaches where relevant


 You will also work with internal data management and platform tooling, so a practical and adaptable engineering mindset is important.
   

  

**What We Are Looking For**
 We are looking for engineers who can deliver well-structured, reliable solutions in production and who take ownership of the quality of what they build. The role suits candidates who are technically strong, pragmatic and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment where data platforms support important business outcomes.
   

  

**Stronger Candidates Will Typically Demonstrate**
* sound judgement in technical trade-offs
* attention to detail in data correctness and testing
* a clear and structured approach to problem solving
* willingness to work closely with stakeholders and partner teams
* an interest in developing long-term expertise within the firm


**About Goldman Sachs**
 At Goldman Sachs, we commit our people, capital and ideas to help our clients, shareholders and the communities we serve to grow. Founded in 1869, we are a leading global investment banking, securities and investment management firm. Headquartered in New York, we maintain offices around the world.
   

  

 We believe who you are makes you better at what you do. We're committed to fostering and advancing diversity and inclusion in our own workplace and beyond by ensuring every individual within our firm has a number of opportunities to grow professionally and personally, from our training and development opportunities and firmwide networks to benefits, wellness and personal finance offerings and mindfulness programs. Learn more about our culture, benefits, and people at GS.com/careers.
   

  

 We’re committed to finding reasonable accommodations for candidates with special needs or disabilities during our recruiting process. Learn more: https://www.goldmansachs.com/careers/footer/disability-statement.html
   

  

 © The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc., 2023. All rights reserved.
   

  

 Goldman Sachs is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, veterans status, disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.

title: Utvecklare till försvarsindustrin
description:
Vill du vara en del av en stor teamleverans till en av HiQs största kunder och samtidigt bidra till ett säkrare samhälle?
   

  

 Vi söker nu dig som är ingenjör som har djup förståelse för teknik och några års arbetslivserfarenhet. I den här rollen kommer du ingå i ett team med erfarna kollegor som alla har hög kompetens inom området. Teamet arbetar i en javabaserad miljö med bland annat utveckling, script, testautomatisering och DevOps.
   

  

 För att trivas hos oss och i rollen tror vi att du som person är flexibel, du räds inte för att göra det som behövs och har förmåga att både samarbeta med andra och arbeta självständigt. Det faller dig naturligt att leverera resultat med hög kvalitet och att lösa kundens problem är din högsta prioritet.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* Högskole-/Civilingenjörsexamen inom datateknik, teknisk fysik, elektroteknik eller motsvarande.
* Minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet av systemutveckling inom Java eller C#.
* Erfarenhet inom testautomatisering, DevOps, felsökning och konfigurering.
* Då arbetet kan omfattas av sekretess krävs svenskt medborgarskap och att du genomför och godkänns i en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll.
* Möjlighet att jobba på plats på kontoret 3-5 dagar i veckan


**Varför HiQ**
 Sedan 1995 har HiQ varit konsultbolaget som förenklat världen för både kunder och slutanvändare med hjälp av teknik, design och kommunikation. HiQ har alltid fokuserat på två saker: att ha kul på jobbet och att leverera lösningar utöver förväntningar - det är vad som driver oss framåt! Vi HiQare är stolta över att ha en kultur som präglas av
 **resultat** 
 ,
 **ansvar, enkelhet** 
 och
 **glädje** 
 . Vi tror på att arbeta tillsammans för att nå våra gemensamma mål och strävar efter att hjälpa varandra att fortsätta växa och utvecklas. Hos oss får du utöver chansen att utveckla din egen kompetens också möjlighet att lära, leda och inspirera dina kollegor.
   

  

*I denna rekrytering tillämpar vi löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan ansökningstiden har gått ut. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!*

title: CRM-Utvecklare
description:
*Vill du utveckla nästa generations marketing automation-lösning hos Agria – med fokus på kod, integrationer och datamodeller? Vi söker en Adobe Campaign-utvecklare som vill kombinera djup teknisk kompetens med viljan att göra skillnad för våra kunder, i en modern, agil organisation där data, personifiering och automatiserade kundflöden står i centrum.*
 Som CRM-Utvecklare får du en nyckelroll i vårt virtuella SAFe-team inom Marketing & Sales. Du kommer att ha tekniskt ansvar för vår marketing automation-lösning Adobe Campaign – från arkitektur och datamodellering till tekniska flöden och implementation av utvecklingsinitiativ från vår CRM-avdelning.
   

  

 Du jobbar nära andra utvecklare, produktägare och marknadsavdelningen och omsätter affärsbehov till hållbara, tekniska lösningar. Rollen är både övergripande och hands-on: du designar helheten, skriver själv kod och ansvarar för tekniska workflows som upprätthåller och utvecklar vår MA-miljö. Det är en renodlad utvecklarroll – du arbetar tekniskt med plattformen och dess integrationer, inte med innehållsproduktion, copy eller kanalval.
   

  

**Du kommer bland annat att:**
* Ta ansvar för lösningsarkitektur, datamodell och teknisk design inom CRM/marketing automation i Adobe Campaign
* Utveckla, testa och driftsätta kod i Adobe Campaign (t.ex. JavaScript-skript, SQL-frågor, tekniska workflows)
* Leda tekniska diskussioner, driva kravdialog och översätta krav till robusta tekniska lösningar
* Stötta och coacha andra utvecklare och vara teknisk förebild inom Adobe Campaign
* Arbeta med integrationer mot andra system (t.ex. CRM, webb, data warehouse, API:er)
* Säkerställa att lösningar är skalbara, prestandaeffektiva och långsiktigt förvaltningsbara
* Bidra till goda utvecklingsrutiner (versionhantering, kodgranskning, dokumentation, monitorering)


 För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du har:
   

  

* Flera års erfarenhet av CRM-utveckling eller liknande systemutvecklarroll
* Gedigen erfarenhet av att designa och implementera datamodeller och integrationer
* Stark databaskompetens (SQL) och vana att hantera stora datamängder
* Erfarenhet av API- och integrationsarbete (REST/SOAP)
* Programmeringskunskaper i JavaScript för scripting i Adobe Campaign, gärna även XML och TML/CSS
* Erfarenhet av Adobe Campaign (Classic eller Standard) är en tydlig fördel
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift


 Du uppskattar en miljö där innovation, testande och lärande uppmuntras, och du har ett genuint intresse för att utveckla både dig själv och dina kollegor. Struktur, tydlig dokumentation och ordning i dataflöden är naturligt för dig – liksom att bidra till Agrias uppdrag: att skapa trygghet för djur och människor genom smartare, mer relevanta kunddialoger.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter** 
 :
   

  

 Rekryterande chef:poja.daroui@agria.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: mirek.swartz@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: ellinor.jateus@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Agria är ett helägt dotterbolag till Länsförsäkringar och finns idag i Sverige, Norge, Finland, Danmark, Storbritannien, Tyskland, Frankrike och Irland. Vårt svenska kontor ligger på Gärdet i Stockholm, men vårt hjärta och verksamhet sträcker sig långt utanför Sveriges gränser. Med en tydlig tillväxt agenda fortsätter vi att expandera internationellt, driva innovation och utveckla digitala lösningar som gör verklig skillnad för djurägare. Ett exempel är vårt dotterbolag Agria Vet Guide, som erbjuder digital rådgivning och gör det enklare att hjälpa fler djur snabbare.
   

  

 Vi är marknadsledande i Norden inom djur- och husdjursförsäkringar, med en tydlig vision: att bli Europas mest omtyckta och pålitliga partner för djurägare. Vårt ledarskap handlar inte bara om marknadsandelar; det handlar om att skapa trygghet för både djur och människor, och att göra livet med djur enklare och roligare.

title: Platform Engineer
description:
Vill du bygga utvecklingsplattformen som hundratals utvecklare på Länsförsäkringar förlitar sig på varje dag? Vi söker dig som drivs av automation, cloud och effektiva utvecklingsflöden, och som vill skapa en utvecklingsplattform där säkerhet, hastighet och utvecklarupplevelse går hand i hand. Hos oss får du möjlighet att forma utvecklarupplevelsen i en organisation där innovation, samarbete och samhällsnytta står i fokus.
   

  

**Om rollen:**
 Som Platform Engineer blir du en nyckelperson i vår plattformsleverans inom DevEx-tåget. Du får vara med och vidareutveckla och förvalta vår utvecklingsplattform samt ta den till nästa nivå i vår DevSecOps-satsning. Ditt fokus kommer att vara att säkerställa regelefterlevnad och förmågor för applikationssäkerhetstestning (SAST/DAST/SCA). Med vår Internal Developer Platform (IDP) skapar vi moderna, automatiserade CI/CD-pipelines som gör det möjligt för utvecklingsteam att snabbt och säkert bygga, testa och driftsätta applikationer. Du arbetar nära produktteam, säkerhetsarkitekter och övriga arkitekter för att driva DevSecOps-principer och continuous delivery i hela kedjan.
   

  

**Du kommer att:**
* Bygga och vidareutveckla vår IDP med fokus på self-service, automation och skalbarhet.
* Designa och implementera robusta DevSecOps-lösningar i Azure Cloud (AWS är ett plus).
* Automatisera allt från releasehantering till deployment och monitoring.
* Integrera säkerhet och compliance i leveranskedjan (Shift Left).
* Vara med och bidra till roadmap för plattformen.
* Dela kunskap och bidra till våra tekniska communitys.


**Tekniker du arbetar med dagligen:** 
 Azure, Kubernetes/OpenShift, Terraform, Checkmarx, Sonatype Suite (Nexus RM, Nexus IQ-Firewall) och moderna CI/CD-verktyg.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som är tekniskt kompetent, nyfiken och har ett öga för helheten. Du gillar att bygga skalbara plattformar, skapa struktur och förbättra utvecklarupplevelsen – och du trivs i en roll där teknik, säkerhet och samarbete går hand i hand. Du är en doer som får saker att hända, har integritet och gillar att jobba i agila team där innovation och förbättring är en del av vardagen.
   

  

**Vi tror att du har:**
* Gedigen erfarenhet av systemutveckling och DevSecOps.
* Djup kunskap om Azure Cloud och dess plattformstjänster (AKS, App Service, Key Vault m.fl.).
* Praktisk erfarenhet av container-orkestrering med Kubernetes eller OpenShift, samt containerisering med Docker.
* Gedigen erfarenhet av CI/CD och pipeline-automation – du har byggt robusta leveransflöden i produktion.
* Erfarenhet av infrastruktur som kod (IaC) med t.ex. Terraform, ARM/Bicep eller liknande.
* Erfarenhet av att bygga eller arbeta med Internal Developer Platforms (IDP) och self-service-lösningar.
* Förmåga att skapa en riktigt bra developer experience och stödja utvecklingsteam.
* Erfarenhet av att integrera säkerhet i CI/CD-pipelines – exempelvis applikationssäkerhetstestning (SAST/DAST), hemlighetshantering och policy enforcement.
* Erfarenhet av att jobba i agila ramverk, gärna SAFe.
* Stark teknisk kommunikationsförmåga – du kan både förklara och fördjupa beroende på målgrupp.
* Affärsmässighet och kostnadsmedvetenhet – du hittar lösningar som skapar värde för både verksamheten och kunden.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, och en vilja att ständigt utvecklas.


**Extra plus om du har:**
* Erfarenhet av AWS och hybrid cloud-miljöer.
* Fördjupad erfarenhet av Sonatype Products (Nexus RM, Nexus IQ – Firewall), Checkmarx och Backstage.
* Kunskap om observability, metrics och monitoring.
* Erfarenhet av GitOps, eventdriven arkitektur och serverless.
* Bakgrund från plattformsdriven utveckling i större organisationer.


**Kontaktpersoner**
 Rekryterande chef: Charlotta.Haldin@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: Lisa-Maria.Carensjo@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Process and Dev Tools är en del av Digital Solution & Operation Platform (DSOP) inom vår IT-organisation Digital & IT. Vi erbjuder stöd, förmågor, verktyg, tekniska plattformar samt processer för samtliga utvecklingsteam inom Länsförsäkringar. Vi arbetar enligt SAFe, med en tydlig vision att skapa en hållbar och effektiv produktutveckling – där DevSecOps är en självklar grundförutsättning
   

  

 Teamet består idag av Product Manager, Product Owners, DevSecOps Engineers, Scrum Masters och Process Owner som tillsammans ansvarar för våra förmågor och processer för IT-utveckling. Vi erbjuder en inkluderande laganda med högt i tak och stora möjligheter till utveckling.

title: AI Engineer
description:
*At* 
***Norrin***
*, we’re shaping the era of Enterprise Intelligence. Our vision is to transform business productivity through data & AI by creating solutions that deliver measurable impact. As a Microsoft technology partner, we are at the forefront of reshaping how businesses operate across the Nordics. What defines us is deep technical expertise, a creative engineering mindset, and a people-first culture. You’ll have the chance to grow in a direction that matters to you while building solutions that make a real difference. With a strong presence in Finland and growing operations in Sweden, the United States, Thailand and Vietnam, we continue to expand our Nordic roots internationally. Most recently, Swedish company* 
***BizOne***
*joined the Norrin Group, further strengthening our presence across the Nordics.*
 We’re looking for
 **AI Engineers** 
 to join our growing team in Stockholm. In this role, you’ll work directly with customers to design, build, and deploy AI-powered solutions that solve real business problems. You’ll combine broad engineering capability with hands-on delivery, moving fast from idea to working prototypes to production-ready value. This role is about creative engineering, co-creation with users, and shaping how enterprises adopt AI in practice.
   

  

 You will also be part of Norrin’s AI Guild, a community where knowledge is shared, skills are developed together, and people actively support each other’s growth.
   

  

**🧩 In This Role, You Will Be**
* Working closely with customers to understand their problems and rapidly design practical AI solutions
* Implementing end-to-end AI/ML workflows, from agents and RAG setups to traditional ML where needed
* Building and deploying cloud-native applications, preferably on Azure
* Applying modern software engineering practices (Git, CI/CD, quality-oriented development)
* Using MLOps approaches to operationalize models, monitor them, and ensure they deliver value
* Integrating with APIs and enterprise systems (REST, events, custom interfaces)
* Working with databases, SQL, and pragmatic data engineering where required
* Navigating between solution shaping, hands-on implementation, and light advisory, depending on the customer phase


**🌱Why Norrin?**
* People-first culture: A workplace where you can be yourself. Our culture is built on openness, equality, and mutual respect
* Flexible working model: Our hybrid model offers the best of both worlds, flexibility in your daily life and in-person collaboration when it moves things forward
* Fair compensation: A competitive salary that reflects your skills and experience
* Grow with us: We encourage continuous learning and development in a direction that matters to you


 ✨
 **What we value**
* 4+ years of experience in software or data applications, ideally with hands-on AI/ML components
* Experience with AI agents and large language models (LLMs)
* Strong cloud development background (Azure preferred)
* Strong skills in Python and modern engineering practices (Git, CI/CD, testing mindset)
* Experience with deploying and operating ML systems in production
* Solid understanding of APIs, integrations, databases, and SQL
* Ability to frame problems, design pragmatic solutions, and work directly with end-users
* Strong English and Swedish skills (written & spoken)
* Educational background in computer science, applied mathematics, engineering, or similar


**➕ What’s a Plus (but Not Required)**
* Experience with IaC and containerization (Terraform, Docker)
* Familiarity with PyTorch, LangChain/LlamaIndex, deep learning, and LLM evaluation frameworks
* Experience working with data platforms (Databricks, Microsoft Fabric, event streams, data warehouses)
* Background in structured testing approaches to ensure robustness
* Prior consulting or customer-facing engineering experience
* Prior leadership or consulting experience, with the ability to guide teams and advise stakeholders


 📩
 **Your next opportunity might start here**
 We’re excited to hear from you! Applications are reviewed continuously, and we’ll move forward as soon as we find the right person. Could it be you?

title: Experienced Frontend Gameplay Programmer
description:
**About Us**
 Hacksaw Studios is a Stockholm-based game studio focused on creating innovative, high-quality gaming experiences. With a focus on performance and precision, we bring ideas to life through technical expertise and creative collaboration. We have wide distribution, and our games are played by millions of people every month by players all over the world.
   

  

 To continue scaling our development efforts, we are looking for an experienced Gameplay Programmer with a focus on frontend development to join our growing team.
   

  

 The Role
   

  

 As an Experienced Gameplay Programmer at Hacksaw Studios, you will play a central role in shaping how our games feel, behave, and perform. You will work closely with designers, artists, and other engineers to build engaging gameplay experiences and ensure our games deliver the level of quality and responsiveness players expect.
   

  

 This role is focused on gameplay and frontend development, where performance, responsiveness, and visual polish are critical. You will be part of a tight-knit development team where collaboration and ownership are highly valued.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities Include**
* Design and implement gameplay systems and features for new and existing games.
* Translate game design concepts into responsive, high-quality gameplay experiences.
* Work closely with designers and product owners to iterate on gameplay and player experience.
* Maintain and extend our internal game development framework.
* Write clean, maintainable, and high-performance code.
* Participate in code reviews and technical discussions within the development team.
* Collaborate with other engineers across teams.


**What We’re Looking For**
* 2+ years of professional software development experience, with several years in the game industry.
* Strong experience with gameplay programming or interactive systems.
* Experience with one or more programming languages commonly used in game development such as C#, C++, Haxe, TypeScript, or JavaScript.
* A strong focus on performance, responsiveness, and player experience.
* Ability to take ownership of systems and features from concept to release.
* Experience working in cross-disciplinary teams with designers and artists.
* Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.


**Nice-to-have**
* Shader programming experience.
* 3d programming experience, such as OpenGL.
* Experience in debugging.
* Social gaming experience.
* Professional experience within the gaming industry.
* Personal or professional experience with AI assisted development.


 What We Offer
   

  

* Close collaboration with developers.
* A modern office in central Stockholm.
* Work with experienced, passionate colleagues in the gaming industry.
* Real influence, ownership, and personal growth opportunities.
* Wellbeing perks including wellness allowance.


 Practical Details
   

  

* This is an on-site position in Stockholm.
* Unfortunately, we cannot assist with relocation or visa sponsorship.


 Ready to Join the Game Makers?
   

  

 Apply now! We review applications on a rolling basis.

title: Digital Creative Strategist
description:
Commercial Development & Growth is a global function within the H&M Brand. Our mission is to define and deliver the global customer experience strategy - strengthening our brand while enabling profitable growth. Together, we develop, expand and optimise all sales channels, creating the conditions for efficient, tech-enabled operations through strong cross-functional collaboration.
   

  





 We play a key role in bringing the brand plan to life by shaping an elevated, inspirational and relevant shopping experience. By putting our product at the heart of the journey, we ensure a seamless and competitive experience for our customers.
   

  





 Within this, the Creative Development department delivers a cohesive brand experience across all channels - anchored in our identity and guided by a clear, consistent and creative vision.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

**WHAT YOU’LL DO**




 We’re now looking for a Digital Creative Strategist to join the Creative Development team and shape the direction of our digital store experience. In this role, you’ll connect strategy with creativity - turning ambition into clear, compelling creative concepts and ideas that drive brand impact, user engagement and commercial success.
   

  





*You will:*



* Frame ambition into clear creative direction
	+ Develop clear creative briefs that clarify scope, ambition, and priorities
	+ Translate strategic input into actionable creative direction that guides digital initiative
	+ Define experience principles and creative guardrails with the overall brand direction


* Shape the creative ambition and expression
	+ Develop core creative concepts, narrative direction, and emotional ambition for key initiatives
	+ Translate creative intent into clear design principles guiding visual identity and storytelling
	+ Make informed creative recommendations balancing brand ambition, user experience, and commercial impact
* Secure quality and coherence in execution
	+ Apply and uphold creative principles to ensure consistency and distinctiveness across products and platforms
	+ Provide creative leadership to internal teams and external partners during concept and design development
	+ Ensure execution aligns with the defined creative direction


**Qualifications**

 WHO YOU ARE
   

  





*We are looking for people with…*



* 8+ years experience in digital creative or design roles
* A degree in Design, Communication, Strategy, or a related field
* High design judgement across digital UI/UX and visual systems

title: Motion Designer
description:

 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.

By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.
   

  

 1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.

title: Trust and Safety Support Specialist
description:
**TL;DR** 
 Our Trust & Safety team is dedicated to safeguarding our users, products, and platform. Be the human in the loop for preventing fraud, harmful behaviors, abuse, and payment risk at Lovable. You'll investigate suspicious accounts, tune detection rules, and turn what you learn from real cases into practice for safety and security.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products — fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Lovable-built applications and websites are visited hundreds of millions of times a month, and our enterprise footprint is compounding fast. And we're just getting started.
   

  

 We're a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We're Looking For**
* 2+ years in fraud operations, payment risk, trust and safety investigations, or a similar support role at a consumer or SaaS platform.
* Experience with handling complex trust and safety cases, policies and resolving disputes requiring communication with customers, platforms and authorities.
* Clear writer. Your case notes and customer updates are clear, accurate and easy-to-read.

**What You'll Do**
* Conduct end-to-end investigations of suspected safety incidents and platform ToS violations and determine appropriate enforcement actions.

**About Your Application**

title: Business Operations Lead
description:
We are super excited to announce that Michael Jerlin is looking for a Business Operations Lead to join Voyado.
   

  

 Voyado is scaling fast, across teams, countries, systems and processes. As we continue to grow, we need to make sure the way we operate internally scales with us.
   

  

 As we continue to grow, we see a significant opportunity to simplify how we work through better systems, integrations, automation and AI-enabled ways of working. Becoming an AI-native company is one of Voyado’s most important business priorities and a key part of that journey.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This is a hands-on builder role for someone who enjoys improving how organizations actually work in practice. You’ll work across Finance, People & Culture, IT and Legal to simplify workflows, improve systems and help teams operate more smoothly as Voyado continues to scale.
   

  

 You’ll spend your time identifying operational friction, connecting people, processes and systems, and driving improvements that make work simpler, more scalable and less dependent on manual effort. You won’t be expected to be the technical expert in every system, but you should be comfortable understanding how systems, data and processes connect, and helping the business and IT move in the same direction.
   

  

 A key part of the role is helping Voyado become a more AI-native company by identifying opportunities where automation and AI can remove repetitive work and improve the employee experience.
   

  

 Success in this role is not measured by the number of initiatives you start, but by the operational friction you remove. If you’re successful, managers spend less time navigating systems, data is more reliable, processes are easier to follow, and teams spend less time on administration and more time creating value.
   

  

 Some of the things you'll be up to:
   

  

* Mapping and improving operational workflows across Finance, People & Culture, IT and Legal
* Identifying bottlenecks, disconnected systems and manual workarounds — and helping teams solve the root causes
* Supporting system implementations, migrations and operational improvement initiatives
* Reducing manual work through automation, integrations and AI-enabled workflows
* Working closely with business and IT stakeholders to create more scalable processes, systems and ways of working


 So, who are you?
   

  

 We care more about how you think and solve problems than your exact background.
   

  

 You’re probably someone who naturally notices inefficiencies and starts thinking about how to simplify them. When you see repetitive manual work, your instinct is to improve the process, automate parts of it or connect systems in a smarter way — not just add more administration around it.
   

  

 You enjoy working close to operations, systems and people at the same time. You don’t need to be deeply technical, but you should feel comfortable understanding how systems, integrations and data flows connect across an organization, and working closely with IT and technical stakeholders.
   

  

 We’re also looking for someone with an AI-native mindset. You’re curious about new capabilities, actively explore how AI can improve workflows and decision-making, and naturally look for opportunities to remove friction through automation and AI-enabled ways of working.
   

  

 We believe you likely have experience with several of the following:
   

  

* Business Operations, RevOps, Product Operations or internal operational improvement work
* Technical or systems-focused roles where you’ve worked close to business processes, systems and integrations
* ERP, HRIS, payroll, billing or operational tooling
* Process improvement, systems implementation or operational scaling
* Working cross-functionally across multiple teams and stakeholders
* Automation tooling, AI-enabled workflows or operational efficiency initiatives
* International organizations with multiple entities, systems or processes


 We also think you:
   

  

* enjoy building structure in environments that are still evolving
* are pragmatic and execution-oriented rather than overly process-heavy
* communicate clearly and collaborate well across teams
* are comfortable driving initiatives without fully defined requirements
* care about making everyday work simpler and more scalable for others


 What's in it for you?
   

  

 Voyado wouldn’t be the powerful platform it is without the people behind it. We really care for our Voyadoers and some examples of what we can offer you are:
   

  

* An engaged team with a knowledge-sharing and friendly culture
* Summits where we hang out, workshop, discuss, and have a good time together
* Opportunities for personal and professional growth and learning in a dynamic and supportive environment.
* Work-life balance – we don't have a long work-hours culture, we value engagement over hours worked.


 Some of our benefits:
   

  

* 30 days of vacation, so you can spend time on the things you love
* Beneficial bike lease, including e-bikes
* Breakfast buffet on Fridays
* Inhouse gym only for Voyadoers
* A generous gadget-and-phone package (your choice!)
* 5000 SEK per year in wellness allowance
* Parental leave top-up additional support for new parents
* A wellness hour you can use every week


**About Voyado**
 Voyado is the agentic CX suite for retail. We help retailers of all sizes to create exceptional experiences – from first click to lasting loyalty. Our products help retailers understand customers, predict behaviors, and deliver personalized journeys that drive conversion and loyalty.
   

  

 With offices in Sweden, the UK, Germany, and the Netherlands, we work with hundreds of leading retailers like H&M, Stronger, Nudie Jeans, and Power. Voyado is backed by Viking Global Investors, Novax, Verdane, eEquity, and H&M Group.
   

  

**Be yourself 🏳️‍🌈**
 At Voyado, we believe in gender equality. We are proud sponsors of Womengineer as well as Tjejer Kodar! Read more about Tjejer Kodar & Voyado here
   

  

  

  

 Equality is not only about gender but also about making everyone feel welcome and heard in a multicultural and diverse environment. We at Voyado strive to make everyone feel like they can bring their true self to work every day. Gender-equal and diverse teams have more perspectives on life and bring different ideas to the table which in the end leads not only to making a better working environment but also a better product.
   

  

 Ready to find out more?
   

  

 Lovely! 🎉
   

  

*Before one applies it can always feel like you need a better resume, more polish, or just another year of experience, but we say if you think this sounds like a place where you can shine don't hesitate to send in your resume!*
**Making it personal with AI**
 We truly believe you’ll position yourself best for success in the interview process by being yourself with support from AI where it makes sense, later in the process you will even be expected to use AI. But at the end of the day, what matters is meeting you, the person behind the application.
   

  

 There is no such thing as a perfect candidate; we’re all human so please, bring your authentic self! Don’t let AI over polish your CV or answers to the point where we can’t hear your real voice because that’s what we care about the most.
   

  

*Note: As of right now we are unable to proceed with applicants outside of the EU, and a requirement of eligibility to work at Voyado is the right to work in the EU without limitations. Needless to say, this is something we are actively working on to be able to onboard colleagues from all over the world.*
 In today’s hyper-competitive market, we help over 500 retail brands across 100 markets attract, convert, and retain loyal customers.
   

  

 With AI-driven CRM, loyalty, e-commerce personalization, and retail media, Voyado turns every interaction - online or in-store - into lasting growth.
   

  

 By combining customer data with product intelligence, we empower retailers to deliver the right message, product, or offer at exactly the right time. The result? Stronger customer relationships and measurable business impact.

title: Content Strategist

title: Penetration Tester
description:
**TL;DR:** 
 We're looking for a world-class Penetration Tester with a name in the field. You'll push Lovable's platform to its limits, hunt vulnerabilities across our AI pipelines and user-generated code, and make sure attackers never get there before you do.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* 12+ years of hands-on penetration testing experience across web, mobile, APIs, and cloud infrastructure.
* A track record the field knows about: CVEs to your name, hall-of-fame credits in major bug bounty programs, or a reputation that precedes you.
* Deep expertise in offensive security techniques: OWASP, MITRE ATT&CK, exploit development, privilege escalation, and lateral movement.
* Hands-on experience using AI as part of your hacking workflow — not just testing AI systems, but actively leveraging it as an offensive tool.
* Experience attacking AI-native products or LLM-integrated systems, including prompt injection, model abuse, and data exfiltration vectors.
* Strong understanding of cloud environments (GCP, AWS, Cloudflare) and the attack surfaces they introduce.
* Ability to translate complex findings into clear, prioritised reports that engineering teams can act on immediately.
* Low ego, high output. You collaborate as naturally as you compete against systems.
* Bonus: experience with red team operations, supply chain attacks, or mobile security (iOS/Android). Familiarity with SAST/DAST tooling.


**What You’ll Do**
* Own offensive security end-to-end: plan and execute penetration tests across Lovable's web platform, mobile surface, APIs, cloud infrastructure, and AI pipelines.
* Break our AI before others do: probe LLM integrations for prompt injection, jailbreaks, data leakage, and novel attack vectors unique to AI-generated code running in live products.
* Stress-test user-generated code at scale: identify systemic vulnerabilities introduced when millions of users create and deploy real applications on Lovable.
* Turn findings into action: work directly with engineering to prioritise, remediate, and verify fixes, closing the loop between discovery and resolution.
* Raise the security bar org-wide: run internal red team exercises, contribute to threat modelling, and embed an attacker's mindset across the engineering culture.
* Help make Lovable the most secure AI product in the market.


**Our Tech Stack**
* Frontend: React and TypeScript
* Backend: Golang and Rust
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Modal, multiple LLM providers
* DevOps & Tooling: GitHub Actions, Grafana, OTEL, infra-as-code (Terraform)
* Data: Clickhouse, Firestore, Spanner, BigQuery


 And we're always exploring what's next!
   

  

**About Your Application**
 Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language, so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.
   

  

 We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested, please apply through our careers portal.
